emails.subject: Meeting
emails.body: Meeting Shelley: Welcome back! I was wondering if you had 30 minutes today to discuss NNG's major customers from a strategic perspective. Stan has asked me (on a very confidential basis) to explore various "buy back" options for NNG, including raising a lot of money! I wanted to get your thoughts on certain customers' willingness to participate in an ownership interest in NNG. I did not want to meet with Dave and his team given the Dynegy transition. I am free all morning except at 9 and this afternoon except from 2 to 4.

emails.subject: RE: Meeting
emails.body: RE: Meeting Hi. I'm here just barely though my sinus infection is back. Can we get together in my office (the less elevator riding the better) sometime between 11-1? I'm planning to be out of office tomorrow. To: Corman, Shelley

emails.subject: RE: Meeting
emails.body: How about 11? To: Howard, Kevin A.

emails.subject: RE: Meeting
emails.body: See you then 4262 To: Corman, Shelley
